subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel with a glossy rain-washed surface reflecting the brightening sky; blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text vivid after the rain; slim monopole above the rooftops
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right pavement, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the pavement
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Glossy dashboard under bright post-rain light, drying droplets on the windshield, dark hood nose reflecting wet sky at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the boulevard past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the boulevard, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A European tree-lined boulevard just after rain around midday, clouds breaking to let bright light glance off the wet, freshly paved asphalt. Spring-green plane trees drip along stone-fronted buildings; puddles mirror the brightening sky and building facades. Cyclists ease past on damp bike lanes. Beyond the right pavement a billboard rises on a slim monopole above the rooftops, its reflection shimmering in the wet road.

lighting.direction: Bright diffuse light with the sun beginning to break through from above
lighting.shadows: Soft, emerging shadows sharpening as the clouds part
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright post-rain clarity with strong wet reflections and puddle mirrors; freshly washed colors and the red stop-sign graphic vivid on the glistening scene

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Fresh spring greens, wet grey stone and asphalt, bright sky reflections in puddles, with red stop sign and blue-white ad accents
aesthetics.patterns: Rows of plane trees, puddle reflections, and repeating facades

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and billboard; wet reflections mirror the scene below

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the rain-washed boulevard; the billboard appears small in the right background ahead, reflected in the wet road.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible in the bright post-rain light.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily along the wet boulevard as clouds break after rain; billboard small in the distance on the right, mirrored in puddles.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable in the brightening light.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the wet road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a European boulevard just after rain, wet asphalt mirroring breaking clouds and spring trees, a billboard small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed over the glistening road. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it passes out of view while the wet road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and the wet hiss of tires on rain-washed asphalt, dripping trees and a distant tram, brightening street ambience; no speech or music.
